Localization.Description: User NTLM authentication failed because access control restrictions are required

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to pass NTLM authentication on host {event_src.host}. Reason: access control restrictions are required.
The user {subject.account.name} failed to pass NTLM authentication on host {event_src.host}. Reason: access control restrictions are required.
